user.title: Set up OpenClaw Conversation Agent
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to your OpenClaw instance (James).

data_description.api_url: URL of your OpenClaw instance, e.g. http://192.168.1.100:8080
data_description.api_key: Bearer token for authentication (leave blank if not required)
data_description.agent_name: Name of the agent in Home Assistant (e.g. James)
data_description.timeout: Maximum time to wait for a response (5–120 seconds)
data_description.send_ha_context: Sends the current state of your devices with every request

error.cannot_connect: Connection failed. Please check the API URL.
error.unknown: Unknown error. Check the HA log for details.

abort.already_configured: This OpenClaw instance is already configured.
